data.body: Root cause proven (illegal `runner` context in job-level env of reconcile-bridge.yml:76, added by f2bde8d3b5 -> parse-time startup failure -> 0 jobs -> no Jira sync for ~2 days). Verified with actionlint RED->GREEN + mutation check. Sibling in reconcile-bridge-canary.yml:69 fixed under same discipline; full workflow re-sweep clean. Change up for review: Gerrit 734 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/734). Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, then Submit; will confirm the reconcile-bridge job creates jobs and turns green on origin/main.
